# Assurance Method Cards

## A-QLG — Quality Gate Test

```text
When: before posting
Input: final asset
Output: pass / rebuild
Failure response: rebuild before posting
```

## A-RPT — Replication Trio

```text
When: after one apparent winner
Input: mechanism + 3 related executions
Output: candidate format / replicate again / kill
Failure response: do not scale
```

## A-HLT — Holdout Ladder Test

```text
When: before calling mechanism reliable
Input: winner + holdout topic/surface/time window
Output: robust / fragile
Failure response: constrain mechanism to context or rewrite
```

## A-DPP — Distribution Portfolio Protocol

```text
When: planning every batch
Input: batch plan
Output: channel-balanced batch
Failure response: add search/owned/partner/controlled exposure lane
```

## A-CRX — Controlled Reach Exposure

```text
When: organic data too low
Input: asset needing validation
Output: minimum exposure data
Failure response: if controlled exposure also fails, creative likely failed
```

## A-SLI — Search Long-Tail Insurance

```text
When: every batch
Input: topic cluster
Output: evergreen search-native asset
Failure response: rewrite with exact query and direct answer
```

## A-FMEA — Failure Mode Analysis

```text
When: weekly postmortem
Input: all posts in batch
Output: failure modes and RPN scores
Failure response: fix highest RPN first
```

## A-BAY — Bayesian Scoreboard

```text
When: after batch metrics
Input: prior belief + new evidence
Output: updated confidence level
Failure response: avoid binary thinking
```

## A-POD — Proof of Distribution

```text
When: low reach creates uncertainty
Input: post + exposure evidence
Output: creative failure vs exposure failure
Failure response: use controlled exposure before killing mechanism
```
